page_title: Vaultly: Smart Finance Management for Modern Millennials

hero.headline: Financial Control, Simplified for Your Digital Life
hero.subheadline: Vaultly transforms complex financial management into an intuitive, powerful experience that grows with you. Track, analyze, and optimize your money—all from one intelligent platform.
hero.hero_image_prompt: Modern, sleek dashboard interface showing financial analytics on a smartphone, with holographic financial graphs and data visualizations. Clean, tech-inspired design with blue and slate color palette. Millennial user interacting with the app.

features.title: Smart Budgeting AI
features.description: Our advanced AI analyzes your spending patterns in real-time, creating personalized budget recommendations that adapt to your lifestyle. No more guesswork—just intelligent financial guidance.
features.image_prompt: Futuristic AI interface showing budget allocation with dynamic, color-coded spending categories and predictive trend lines.

features.title: Secure Transactions
features.description: Bank-grade encryption and multi-factor authentication protect every transaction. We've built a fortress around your financial data, so you can focus on what matters most—your goals.
features.image_prompt: Digital security visualization with interconnected blockchain-like security nodes, representing transaction protection.

features.title: Real-Time Financial Insights
features.description: Instant snapshots of your financial health with interactive dashboards. Track investments, monitor cash flow, and receive actionable insights that help you make smarter financial decisions.
features.image_prompt: Interactive financial dashboard with real-time graphs, investment performance widgets, and predictive financial health indicators.

testimonials.quote: Vaultly has completely transformed how I manage my finances. It's like having a financial advisor in my pocket!
testimonials.name: Alex Rodriguez
testimonials.title: Software Engineer

contact_form.title: Join the Financial Revolution
contact_form.subtitle: Start your free trial and take control of your financial future
contact_form.success_message: Welcome to the future of financial management! We'll send you an exclusive invite shortly.

cta_section.headline: Your Financial Potential, Unlocked
cta_section.subheadline: No hidden fees. No complex jargon. Just powerful, intuitive financial management.

images.prompt: Modern, sleek dashboard interface showing financial analytics on a smartphone, with holographic financial graphs and data visualizations. Clean, tech-inspired design with blue and slate color palette. Millennial user interacting with the app.
